COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Collins, appellant, is present in court.
Jesse Alsip, respondent, is also present in court.

This cause comes on for trial de novo, having been assigned to the Honorable Judge Paul H. Alvarado.

Appellant James Collins testifies on his own behalf.
Respondent Jesse Alsip testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Paul H. Alvarado, NOT REPORTED, clerk: Lesley Fiscella (611).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
